scheduled_tasks.name: task-center-schedule-system-quick-snapshot-hourly
scheduled_tasks.description: 每小时抓取一次系统快速快照，适合作为高频健康采样。

scheduled_tasks.name: task-center-schedule-system-deep-inspection-daily
scheduled_tasks.description: 每天凌晨做一次深度巡检，适合保留系统基线与异常线索。

scheduled_tasks.name: task-center-schedule-http-endpoint-check-5min
scheduled_tasks.description: 每 5 分钟检查一次关键 HTTP/HTTPS 健康接口。

scheduled_tasks.name: task-center-schedule-config-backup-nightly
scheduled_tasks.description: 每天凌晨备份一次关键配置文件。

scheduled_tasks.name: task-center-schedule-periodic-pcap-disabled
scheduled_tasks.description: 周期性抓包任务模板，默认禁用，按需开启。

scheduled_tasks.name: task-center-schedule-network-config-backup-nightly
scheduled_tasks.description: 每天凌晨归档一次多厂商网络设备配置快照，默认禁用。

scheduled_tasks.name: task-center-schedule-network-baseline-weekly
scheduled_tasks.description: 每周做一次多厂商网络基线盘点，默认禁用。

scheduled_tasks.name: task-center-schedule-switch-config-backup-nightly
scheduled_tasks.description: 每天凌晨做一次交换机配置归档，默认禁用。

scheduled_tasks.name: task-center-schedule-f5-config-backup-nightly
scheduled_tasks.description: 每天凌晨做一次 F5 逻辑对象快照备份，默认禁用。
